AN EF1 TORNADO FORMED 4 MILES SOUTH OF LAMONT IOWA AND TRACKED TO THE NORTHEAST FOR 17 MILES ENDING IN EDGEWOOD IOWA. MOST OF THE DAMAGE WAS SOUTH AND EAST OF DUNDEE IOWA INTO EDGEWOOD IOWA. SEVERAL GRAIN BINS COLLASPED OR WERE DESTROYED. TWO OLD HOG CONFINEMENTS WERE SERIOUSLY DAMAGED ALONG WITH AN ALUMINUM ROOF BEING TORN OFF. NUMEROUS TREES WERE SNAPPED ALONG THE PATH. PEAK WIND WAS 95 MPH. ESTIMATE START TIME WAS 930PM AND END TIME WAS 955PM.
